scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.start: npm run build && cd backend && python -m uvicorn server:app --reload --port 8000 --host 0.0.0.0
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && python -m uvicorn server:app --reload --port 8000 --host 0.0.0.0" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
